drop_reason.PR_DEV: label proxy — computed from same rule as pseudo-labels
drop_reason.img_*_score: all synthetic — no real YOLO scores yet, adds leak not signal

image_scores_status: excluded — retrain as phase2 once real YOLO scores available
phase2_note: add img_* features back after YOLO Stage 5 produces real scores
threshold_note: threshold=0.5 gave sensitivity=0.28 due to compressed probability range. 0.18 chosen at best F1 point: sensitivity=0.91, specificity=0.95
